figures.caption: Figure 2 – Population-level optical connectivity mapping. (a) Representative widefield field-of-view showing Voltron2JF585 signal, spanning multiple cortical layers (left), with spatial heatmap of PSP amplitude (% df/f) measured for individual cell ROIs (right) in response to contralateral motor cortex axon activation. (b) PSP timeseries measured across imaged neurons from a single experiment, showing responding (red) and non-responding (grey) cells. Traces for a randomly selected 190 neurons are shown out of a total 218 imaged in one experiment.
